name.en: The Orchestrator of the Sacred Beasts
name.ja: <ruby>三<rt>さん</rt></ruby><ruby>幻<rt>げん</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby>の<ruby>操<rt>そう</rt></ruby><ruby>世<rt>せい</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt>しゃ</rt></ruby>

text.en: You can reveal this card in your hand; discard 1 card, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your hand in Defense Position, except a Level 8 monster. You can discard 1 card; Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your hand or GY in Defense Position, except a Level 8 monster or the discarded card. You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your GY in Defense Position, except a Level 8 monster. You can only use each effect of "The Orchestrator of the Sacred Beasts" once per turn.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的①②③效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：向对手出示手牌的此卡可以发动。挑选自己的1张手牌舍弃，从手牌将1只等级8以外的“三幻魔”怪兽以守备表示特殊召唤。②：舍弃1张手牌可以发动。从自己手牌・墓地将除所舍弃的卡以外的、1只等级8以外的“三幻魔”怪兽以守备表示特殊召唤。③：将墓地的此卡除外可以发动。从自己墓地将1只等级8以外的“三幻魔”怪兽以守备表示特殊召唤。
